page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.13xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 52 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 52 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a single thread per core configuration, this instance provides predictable compute performance without hyperthreading resource sharing. The system is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.69 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The hardware profile offers a balanced ratio of compute to memory, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring high core counts and dedicated CPU allocation without the overhead of hyperthreading. Appropriate workloads include enterprise applications, web serving, medium-sized databases, and general-purpose business-critical applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.13xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 52 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-based server allocates one thread per physical core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio of approximately 3.69 GB per core makes this instance a qualitatively cost-effective choice for multi-threaded enterprise applications, web serving, containerized microservices, and database workloads requiring predictable CPU performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.13xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 52 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 192.0 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for predictable enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 52-core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory and baseline 12 Gbps networking for predictable enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 52 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs with single-thread-per-core allocation.
192.0 GB of system memory providing 3.69 GB of RAM per core.
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer.
KVM hypervisor architecture with no local storage or GPU accelerators.
Suited for enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads.
